title: CPVP yxusuf05+Anime sky
description: A Crystal PVP Texture pack,with custom textures+Anime sky
body:
- Custom Background
- Custom Armor and Weapons
- Custom End Crystals and Respawn Anchors
- PvP Utilities
- And More!



Optifine is required to display sky textures on Forge

https://optifine.net/downloads

For sky textures on Fabric, you need these mods:

  Skyboxify or

 FabricSkyBoxes and FabricSkyBoxes Interop
